title: Staff AI Reliability Engineer
summary: Own the agent evaluation harness and reliability budgets for Helio's customer-facing voice agents. Partner with applied teams to keep p95 latency under 900ms and answer-quality regressions below 1% per release.
must_have: 5+ years building production LLM or agent systems
Hands-on with eval harnesses, golden-trace datasets, regression gates
Comfort owning on-call rotations for a customer-facing AI surface
nice_to_have: Open-source agent or eval tooling contributions
Experience with Twilio or telephony integrations
